text_block_list.text: Search... The time... is now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you it's another premonition! Today is
the lucky day I uncover the truth behind the
secret spell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is still trying to learn about
the mysterious piece of paper she found back at
home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, the student council won't stop us this
time! I already performed a flower divination as
per the teachings of the great Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It says I should borrow a friend's helping hand for
good luck! ...But, uh, after all the trouble I caused
the other day, that might be difficult...

Lo and behold, in your eleventh hour... the sun
itself, in other words, yours truly, has come to
your aid!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that is if you wish to have companions
along this journey of new discoveries over yonder!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
M-me too! Fukukitaru, you listened to my
troubles during the karuta tournament... S-so I
want to return the favor!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! You can sit back and relax now that we're
here! I'm great at solving riddles!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: E-everyone...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Is this the ritual diagram? It has some drawings, a
few numbers, and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Chimes, "20," dancer, "3," flowers, "0," and
carp... What does this all mean?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Haaah ha ha! Sounds to me like a
mythos of romance betwixt man and beast!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hark, let this flower bed host my sweet nothings to you, a sound to rival Cupid's chimes! My heart dances for you, even if you are a carp!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what about the numbers? Like the twenty
and three?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Argh... I don't know... Is there no hope?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Chimes, dancers, flowers, carp... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I got it! These are all back at home! The Shinto
bell, the shrine's kagura hall, flower ornaments,
and the carp pond!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There is hope after all! So, what do the numbers
mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The number of paces to the clue.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I remember now... This... is a treasure map my big
sister made.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It was when I was learning how to write...
She made the map for fun saying it'll help me
learn my numbers.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait, if I remember correctly, your sister is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, she passed away a long time ago. So long
ago... that my memory's become like this. That's
why—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad! The secret spell helped me remember
my dear sister!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I would've never realized if you all hadn't helped
me! I'd still be running around on a wild goose
chase...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, thank you all! I feel so warm and fuzzy inside!
This is what they call a happy ending, right?!
choice_data_list: But the treasure still remains a mystery!
But the treasure still remains a mystery!
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, thank you all! I feel so warm and fuzzy inside!
This is what they call a happy ending, right?!
choice_data_list: But the treasure still remains a mystery!
But the treasure still remains a mystery!
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the finale is yet to come! Let us go forth
and see this to the end!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Yeah! Since we've come this far together,
let's keep pushing forward!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Me and my sister never finished our
treasure hunt.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna look for it by myself, just like old
times!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Good luck! I hope you'll discover something
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Matikanefukukitaru tells me
that while she still hasn't managed to find the
treasure, she did find a bunch of letters and maps
she exchanged with her sister in those bygone
days.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm never ever gonna forget about it again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, your sister must be really happy to hear
that! I bet she's smiling like you right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru holds her precious map
tenderly to her chest, her smile as bright as the
sun.
